input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule V.3.1.5 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: v.3.1.5
            TITLE: all spherical rod ends and spherical bearings on the suspension and steering must be one of:

            CONTENT:
            rule V.3.1.5: All spherical rod ends and spherical bearings on the suspension and steering must be one of:
V.3.1.5 All spherical rod ends and spherical bearings on the suspension and steering must be one of: 
• Mounted in double shear  
• Captured by having a screw/bolt head or washer with an outside diameter that is larger 
than spherical bearing housing inside diameter.

final_answer: All spherical rod ends and spherical bearings on the suspension and steering must be one of: V.3.1.5 All spherical rod ends and spherical bearings on the suspension and steering must be one of: • Mounted in double shear • Captured by having a screw/bolt head or washer with an outside diameter that is larger than spherical bearing housing inside diameter.
